evals.prompt: I sell resistance bands and elastic bands, AOV $80–200, mainly on standalone site + Shopify, using Klaviyo. I want to use 'training plans' for post-purchase and repurchase: send a beginner plan after purchase, then push an advanced plan a few weeks later to drive repurchase. Give me a set of actionable flow designs including triggers, timelines, plan names per flow, email structure, and how they map to Klaviyo.
evals.expected_output: Output includes: flow map listing all flows (post-purchase plan delivery, advancement plan for repurchase), per-flow specs with trigger, exit rules, timeline (T+), plan type and name, message subject/body structure/CTA, KPIs, and Klaviyo implementation mapping. Plan content list tying plans to products.

assertions.name: has_flow_map
assertions.description: Output contains a 'Training plan flow overview' or Flow map section listing flow names and goals

assertions.name: has_post_purchase_and_repurchase_flows
assertions.description: At least includes post-purchase beginner plan delivery flow and advanced/repurchase flow specs

assertions.name: each_flow_has_required_fields
assertions.description: Each flow spec includes Goal, Trigger, Exit rules, Timeline, plan type, Messages structure, KPIs

assertions.name: has_plan_content_list
assertions.description: Output contains a 'Plan content list' with at least one plan and its applicable products/duration

assertions.name: has_klaviyo_mapping
assertions.description: Implementation mapping explicitly mentions Klaviyo or how to build in Klaviyo

evals.prompt: We sell yoga rings and foam rollers; repurchase rate is low. We want to use a '21-day challenge' for acquisition and send a 7-day beginner plan after first purchase to improve retention. Need: challenge flow for acquisition (unlock on lead capture or first order), post-purchase 7-day plan delivery flow, and simple segmentation (new vs post-first-purchase). Email primary; SMS only for key moments.
evals.expected_output: Output includes: flow map with challenge (acquisition) flow and post-purchase 7-day plan delivery flow; segment logic (new vs post-first-purchase); trigger/exit/timeline/message structure per flow; note that SMS is only for key moments; plan content list (21-day challenge, 7-day beginner) and product fit.

assertions.name: has_challenge_flow
assertions.description: Includes acquisition flow spec with 21-day challenge / unlock on lead capture or first order

assertions.name: has_7day_post_purchase_flow
assertions.description: Includes post-purchase 7-day beginner plan delivery flow with 7-day/beginner plan type

assertions.name: has_segment_logic
assertions.description: Segment logic is clear: new vs post-first-purchase (or equivalent)

assertions.name: sms_only_key_moments
assertions.description: SMS usage is limited (e.g. key moments only)

assertions.name: plan_list_fits_products
assertions.description: Plan content list includes at least 21-day challenge and 7-day beginner, tied to yoga ring/foam roller

evals.prompt: Fitness accessory store with resistance band sets and single bands. We want to win back people who haven’t bought in 60 days using a 'new plan,' not heavy promotion upfront. Give one win-back flow: trigger, timeline, email subject and body framework, suggested plan type, and exit rules.
evals.expected_output: Output includes: one flow spec for win-back (60-day no purchase); trigger and exit rules; timeline (e.g. T+0 email with new plan); subject/hook and body structure emphasizing 'new plan' not heavy discount; suggested plan type (e.g. new weekly plan or short challenge); KPI and implementation note.

assertions.name: win_back_trigger
assertions.description: Flow spec Trigger is 60-day no purchase or similar win-back definition

assertions.name: message_emphasizes_plan_not_discount
assertions.description: Email subject or body framework focuses on 'new plan,' not heavy discount

assertions.name: has_plan_type_suggestion
assertions.description: Includes plan type suggestion (e.g. weekly plan, short challenge)

assertions.name: has_timeline_and_kpi
assertions.description: Includes timeline (e.g. T+0) and KPI or implementation note
